title: US Literacy and Reading Trends Analysis
first_prompt: I'd like you to take a time period from the 1990s to present day 2025, and find the data that would be relevant to show the rate of literacy versus the rate of literary reading (novels, short stories)
summary: Irwin sought to create a comprehensive visualization comparing the rate of general literacy against the rate of literary reading (novels and short stories) in the United States from the 1990s to the present. The conversation evolved after the assistant corrected the initial use of NAEP, shifting the focus to adult literacy data, which was then compiled into an interactive HTML artifact. This visualization underwent several refinements, including the removal of commas from the year axis labels, increasing the chart height to 250 pixels for greater visual impact, and fixing the date format in the tooltips, ultimately leading to a request for a PNG export.
